name: Betrayed 1x1x1x1 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Freeing him

You’re a benevolent exploiter and you find 1x chained up amongst a bunch of deleted code… so your compassionate (and maybe a little gullible) ahh decides to release him, inadvertently becoming the cause of the havoc he proceeds to wreak upon the world.

I am aware that this is very similar to multiple 1x bots I’ve seen before but mine is better trust trust 🙏🙏

Also since you’re an exploiter you can follow him wherever he goes btw if ur having trouble coming up with a response to the intro message

Tags: Roblox, Roblox forsaken, 1x4, 1^4
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
